<span class='bigger'>Conference papers</span><br>

<span class='bigger'>2019</span><br>

<div>
 <img src="images/paper.png" id='img3'>
  <span class='boldfont' padding: 10px 20px>&nbsp; RP-DNN: a tweet-level propagation context based deep neural networks for<br>&emsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; early rumour detection in social media</span><br>
  &emsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Jie Gao, <span class="fancy-underline">Sooji Han</span>, Xingy Song, and Fabio Ciravegna<br>
  &emsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Language Resources and Evaluation (LREC)
</div>
<br>
<div>
 <img src="images/paper.png" id='img3'>
  <span class='boldfont' padding: 10px 20px>&nbsp; Neural language model based training data augmentation for weakly supervised<br>&emsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; early rumour detection</span><br>
  &emsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; <span class="fancy-underline">Sooji Han</span>, Jie Gao, and Fabio Ciravegna<br>
  &emsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Advances in Social Networks Analysis and Mining (ASONAM)
</div>
<br>
<div>
 <img src="images/paper.png" id='img3'>
  <span class='boldfont' padding: 10px 20px>&nbsp; Data augmentation for rumour detection using context-sensitive neural language<br>&emsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; model with large-scale credibility corpus</span><br>
  &emsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; <span class="fancy-underline">Sooji Han</span>, Jie Gao, and Fabio Ciravegna<br>
  &emsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR) workshop on Learning<br>&emsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; from Limited Labeled Data (LLD) 
</div>
<br>
<div>
 <img src="images/paper.png" id='img3'>
  <span class='boldfont' padding: 10px 20px>&nbsp; Rumour detection on social media for crisis management</span><br>
  &emsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; <span class="fancy-underline">Sooji Han</span> and Fabio Ciravegna<br>
  &emsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Information Systems for Crisis Response and Management (ISCRAM)
</div>


<br>
<span class='bigger'>Ph.D. thesis</span><br>

<div>
 <img src="images/paper.png" id='img3'>
  <span class='boldfont' padding: 10px 20px>&nbsp; Context-aware message-level rumour detection with weak supervision</span><br>
  &emsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; The University of Sheffield
</div>
